lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I insured your Hitpoints XP up to level [level]. But now there's no more need for that, would you like a refund? It's [amount] coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, give me back my [amount] coins

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you can hold onto that for me.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Alright. I don't pay interest, though!

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I used to sell life insurance, protecting people's Hitpoints XP when they died. Now there's no more need for that, so I'm just giving refunds now. But I don't think I owe you anything.

sections.title: When on a Deadman: Reborn or Deadman: Apocalypse world

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: People don't lose experience when they die in this event, so no-one's buying life insurance from me. I may as well not be here!

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Death is everywhere! At any moment, a band of brigands might rush in and kill you, or your closest friend might stab you in the back. Welcome to Gelin's Life Insurance Brokerage.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: When you die, you may lose Hitpoints XP, so your Hitpoints level may decrease. I offer an insurance service, preventing your Hitpoints level from falling below a certain level.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I see you're insured up to level 25 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 25.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I see you're insured up to level 50 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 50.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I see you're insured up to level 75 Hitpoints - if you lose Hitpoints XP on death, you will never drop below level 75. That's the highest level of insurance I offer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy life insurance?

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: You must have a Hitpoints level of 25 before you may insure yourself.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: You must have a Hitpoints level of 50 before you may insure yourself to that level.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: You must have a Hitpoints level of 75 before you may insure yourself to that level.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I can insure you up to level 75 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 1,000,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Alternatively, I can insure you up to level 50 Hitpoints. That service costs only 100,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Finally, I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints. That service costs only 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't afford any of those options.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Insure me to level 75 for 1,000,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 75 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Insure me to level 25 for 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 25 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thank you.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I can insure you up to level 50 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 100,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Alternatively, I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints. That service costs only 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't afford either of those options.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Insure me to level 50 for 100,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 50 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Insure me to level 25 for 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 25 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thank you.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I can insure you up to level 50 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 100,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 50 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I can insure you up to level 25 Hitpoints, so that your Hitpoints level will never decrease below that. This service costs 25,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thank you. Your Hitpoints level will never decrease below 25 when you are defeated in future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I am Gelin, the greatest assassin ever to train in Al Kharid. If you have not heard of me, that is because my victims never live to speak of me.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: In my years as a warrior of fortune, I have fought in many lands, meeting fighters of all calibres, and I found they all had something in common:

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Every single one had a soul-gripping fear that they would suffer a humiliating defeat at the hands of their foes.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: They did not fear the pain, you understand. They feared the diminishment that comes with defeat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Diminishment?

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: To see one's wealth in the hands of another. To see one's skills decrease, as the hard-earned experience is lost. That is what they all feared.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: Thus I was inspired to create this life insurance brokerage. I can protect your Hitpoints experience, so that you will not lose so much of it when you are defeated.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: I cannot protect other skills, and I have no intention whatsoever of protecting anyone's items - a victor deserves their spoils.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you sell life insurance in a graveyard?

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: There is no more fitting place! The graves of the dead remind the living that their lives are fragile, and that death is the inescapable fate of all mortals.

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: That is exactly the frame of mind that encourages people to buy life insurance from me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I ever get a refund on this insurance?

lines.speaker: Gelin
lines.text: No, my life insurance policies are for life. Similarly, when a customer upgrades their policy to a better one, I charge the full price of the new policy. They may take it or leave it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.
